compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Root cause confirmed: run_case dispatched only criterion ids, code-review prompt ids, and the 3 agentic reviewers; 'plan-review-novelty' additionally would have been mangled by _criterion_id (prefix-stripped to 'novelty', a nonexistent criterion). Fix: added _run_novelty_case in src/rebar/llm/evals/eval_solver.py — an exact-id dispatch arm checked BEFORE the criterion arm — routing each labeled {carryover,novel} case's finding/prior_finding pair through the same score_novelty kernel path the Pass-3 rising floor uses (RunRequest wiring mirrors plan_review._score_floor_novelty: output_schema plan_review_novelty, single_turn), returning {'novelty': float} which the discriminates_novelty scorer reads. Offline FakeRunner tests added in tests/unit/test_eval_solver.py (novel->1.0, carryover->0.0, both score PASS).

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: LIVE RUN RECORDED (2026-07-15, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY present, run_eval('plan-review-novelty') via rebar.llm.evals.eval from this fix's worktree): PASSED — gate at_least(2), epochs 3, epoch_pass [true,true,true], coverage 1.0. Per-case verdicts (discriminates_novelty, all 3 epochs): N1-carryover PASS/PASS/PASS, N1-novel PASS/PASS/PASS, N2-carryover PASS/PASS/PASS, N2-novel PASS/PASS/PASS, N3-carryover PASS/PASS/PASS, N3-novel PASS/PASS/PASS — 18/18 testcases, 0 failures, no ValueError. The eval is live-runnable end-to-end.

compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. Install the agents extra + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; 2. invoke the live eval path run_eval('plan-review-novelty') (src/rebar/llm/evals/eval.py) as docs/plan-review-gate.md suggests ('the discriminates_novelty eval remains available to re-run'); 3. observe eval_solver.run_case (src/rebar/llm/evals/eval_solver.py:156) raise ValueError for every dataset case.

Expected: the plan-review-novelty prompt's discriminates_novelty gold set runs live and reports per-case verdicts. Actual: run_case dispatches only criterion ids (_criterion_id), code-review prompt ids (_code_review_prompt_id), and the three hardcoded agentic reviewers (completion-verifier / ticket-quality / spec-alignment); plan-review-novelty matches none, so the eval cannot execute and the gate-doc claim is hollow.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] eval_solver.run_case dispatches plan-review-novelty cases to the novelty scorer path (score_novelty with a case-supplied prior-findings set), returning per-case scoreable output.
- [ ] The discriminates_novelty gold set runs end-to-end live: the eval completes with per-case verdicts (no ValueError), demonstrated by a recorded run.
- [ ] A unit test pins the dispatch (a plan-review-novelty case routed offline via FakeRunner does not raise).
compiled_state.title: discriminates_novelty eval is not live-runnable: no plan-review-novelty dispatch arm in eval_solver.run_case
